description: State document. Dated: Jumādā I 524. There are registration marks/notes at the top. Looks very interesting, possibly mentioning taxation, Ibrāhīm al-Armanī, "the sect of the easterners" (ṭāʾifat al-mashāriqa) and a dignitary titled Muʾayyad al-Mamlaka wa-Majduhā ʿImād al-Dawla wa-Naṣruhā..... Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
